creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 258623
net-p2p/{hostd,renterd,walletd}.patch: Work in Progress

(In reply to bruno from comment #15)
%%ETCDIR%% gets translated into, for hostd, /usr/local/etc/hostd with .yml.sample suffix, so it is a correct entry but as you wished, i switched to specifying package list files in Makefile.

> what is the issue with just using the PLIST_FILES section in the Makefile ?
> according to the guide it's acceptable to use that when there are few files in a port

That was just my preference but i reverted back.

(In reply to bruno from comment #16)

You are asking me if i am committer, twice. :D I am the guy on FreeBSD forums that said will check your port. Also, committers would have some badge next to their names in the bugzilla, so I am not a committer.

by the way, I test all of your ports in poudriere build system and there isn't a failure, they all passed the testport process fine. I didn't test if the programs work as they intended, though.

I am attaching the my new patch, that fixes all these.
